Operations AI · Capital Horizon
High confidenceVelocity + Suppliers + CashSynced 3 min ago
Structural stockout
2 SKUs will run out before any reorder can land
Cylinder Vase (0 on hand) and Screen Protector (2.5 days) have runway shorter than lead time. These reorders are non-negotiable — place today.
Cash crunch ahead
The packaging reorder lands the tight week — day 12
$45K leaves on the same week as the bestseller restock. Together they pull deployable cash to its lowest point of the horizon. Stagger or hold one.
Restraint
Don't reorder Fabric Dye — 30 days of cover, slowing
Velocity down 40% and existing stock covers 30 days. Holding frees $9K for the SKUs that actually move. Liquidate the dead Display Stand to recover $2.7K.

Magellan holds here: the 4 urgent reorders that would otherwise stock out, placed now for $147K, leaving $193K — a comfortable $73K above the floor. The rest can wait for the next cash cycle.

MConsole note
Read
Deployable cash $340K, net of tax and payroll reserve. 6 SKUs are below their reorder trigger; the liquidity floor is $120K — the cash you must never spend.
Exposure
Placing 4 orders sends $147K out of the bank — deployable cash falls to $193K, $73K above the $120K floor. The tightest week is day 12, when the lumpy packaging order lands.
Directive
Place the 4 urgent reorders now ($147K). Defer USB-C and Gift Set to the next cycle. Hold Fabric Dye — 30 days of cover. Liquidate the Vintage Display Stand to recover $2.7K.
Ask Magellan anything…
